case_number: Civil Petition for Leave to Appeal No.672-K

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-511 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hearing of CMA No.10350/2025. (Contempt) 22.08.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Ghumro, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG. ------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed the order dated 03rd July, 2025 passed by the Supreme Court of Pakistan in Civil Petition for Leave to Appeal No.672-K / 2025, which has upheld the impugned judgment dated 17.03.2025 passed by this Court. According to learned AAG, compliance of the Judgment dated 17.03.2025 has been made and in this regard he has filed the order of the Director (Elementary, Secondary & Higher Secondary) Hyderabad Region, Hyderabad dated 18.08.2025. It is noted that although the petitioner has been reinstated, but the Judgment dated 17.03.2025 has not been fully complied with, as the petitioner has not been paid his back benefits from the date of his termination until when he assumed charge. Accordingly, the Secretary Schools & Literacy Department, Government of Sindh is directed to comply this aspect of the order within four weeks of the date of this order. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Secretary School & Literacy Department, Government of Sindh for compliance. The contempt application is disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
